title: Trondheim Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Trondheim, with a Z-Score of -3.69. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Trondheim are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with heating degree days (HDD) at 13.9 GG, and no cooling degree days (CDD) at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 62% and the wind speed is moderate at 11.5 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Monitoring and contingency plans should be implemented immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to frost
